title: Sizzling Ukrainian-Style Chicken Stew
description: A hearty keto chicken stew with a twist of Ukrainian flavor. This dish is perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the Ukrainian sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the pot and set aside.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, carrots, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the broth, tomato paste, and hot sauce to the pot. Stir to combine.
Return the sausage to the pot and bring the stew to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
